features: Effective protection plus care in a little can
Up to 48 hours of confidence-boosting antiperspirant protection
description: Product Description Dove Cucumber and green tea antiperspirant deodorant comes with unique 1/4 moisturising cream and Vitamin E. It is proven to improve the look and feel of underarm skin. It leaves a refreshingly light sensation for your underarms, you can now feel fresh and clean all day long. It comes with 48 hours antiperspirant protection and is alcohol free. Directions Apply a thin, even layer to underarms in the morning. Reapply as needed throughout the day or after physical activity for up to 48 hours of protection.
